data.title: WAF Tester
data.metaTitle: Advanced WAF Tester | Autonomous Firewall Security Validation | Clixerfy
data.metaDescription: Validate your Web Application Firewall's defensive edge. Clixerfy WAF Tester uses multi-engine differential probing and objective-driven playbooks to expose bypass flaws.

herosection.titleText: The Clixerfy WAF Tester: Autonomous Firewall Validation
herosection.subtitle: Don’t Just Assume Your WAF Works. Prove It.

children.text: Don’t Just Assume Your WAF Works. Prove It.

Most enterprises deploy a Web Application Firewall (WAF) and rely on out-of-the-box rule sets to block malicious traffic. The flaw? Threat actors don’t attack blindly; they mutate their payloads, exploit protocol ambiguities, and look for differential blind spots between core firewall parsing engines. If your security validation relies on manual penetration testing or static vulnerability scans, you are missing hidden bypass vulnerabilities.

Clixerfy WAF Tester provides absolute visibility. Engineered as an objective-driven, multi-engine security validation platform, it continuously probes your web application defenses with multi-layered, adaptive attack sequences. It uncovers precise WAF bypass opportunities before malicious entities can exploit them.
Clixerfy scales seamlessly from an autonomous standalone testing environment to an integrated infrastructure component within modern engineering operations.

items.title: WAF Coverage & Effectiveness Scoring
items.desc: Rather than delivering an endless list of unorganized alerts, Clixerfy calculates a normalized Protection Score (0–100) across your distinct application pathways, letting management visualize precise defensive posture improvements over time.

items.title: Deterministic Learning Lab
items.desc: Our platform learns from your defensive behaviors. By running controlled validation cycles, the system maps successful mutations into localized profiles, identifying exactly what rule tweaks are required to seal exposure points.

items.title: Kubernetes Native Engineering
items.desc: Built for modern cloud infrastructure, Clixerfy includes a native K8s Operator CRD architecture (WAFScan + ScheduledScan). Security pipelines can be defined as code, deployed via YAML manifests, and scheduled seamlessly across enterprise staging platforms.

features.sectionTitle: Why Compliance and AppSec Teams Trust Clixerfy

children.text: Standard network vulnerability tools check if your patches are current. Clixerfy validates if your active defenses actually work.

items.title: Audit-Ready Evidence Custody Chains
items.desc: Export verifiable, compliance-grade security logs complete with raw curl requests, Python replay scripts, and cryptographic evidence bundles.

items.title: WAF-Specific Rule Recommendations
items.desc: When a bypass is confirmed, Clixerfy doesn't just say you're vulnerable; it provides localized rule configuration advice tailored to your firewall stack to speed up mitigation.

items.title: Multi-Tenant Dashboard Isolation
items.desc: Securely handle isolated target applications, distinct developer groups, or segmented client organizations with robust multi-tenant authorization headers and access filters.

cta.title: Verify Your Firewall Defenses Before Attackers Do
cta.subtitle: Uncover hidden bypass vulnerabilities and optimize your WAF protection with data-backed, multi-engine differential testing.

Richtext.title: How the Clixerfy WAF Tester Operates

children.text: Our architecture executes a rigorous, multi-phased pipeline that moves flawlessly from initial asset discovery to verified mitigation recommendations.

child.title: Phase 1: Objective-Driven Playbook Engine
child.subtitle: Instead of randomly throwing isolated payloads at your firewall, Clixerfy utilizes 11 built-in, objective-driven attack playbooks. These playbooks systematically run multi-step attack strings across core risk categories, including:

children.text: Reflected & Stored XSS
SQL Injection (SQLi) and Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
Remote Code Execution / Command Injection (CMDi)
HTTP Request Smuggling and Authentication Bypass

child.title: Phase 2: AI Attack Planner & Smart Budgeting

children.text: To mimic a highly determined threat actor without degrading your infrastructure's availability, our AI Attack Planner dynamically scores attack strategies based on your underlying framework (e.g., Node.js, PHP, Java). The system operates under strict budget constraints, using live feedback loops to dynamically rebalance its methods and scale down testing intensity if target response patterns change.

child.title: Phase 3: Headless Browser & Evidence Validation
child.subtitle: To completely eliminate false positives, Clixerfy incorporates an Evidence-First validation model. Findings progress through a strict 5-level qualification hierarchy (RESEARCH $\rightarrow$ SUSPICIOUS $\rightarrow$ VALIDATED $\rightarrow$ CONFIRMED $\rightarrow$ VENDOR_READY).

children.text: Critical Security Standard: No Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) payload is ever marked as CONFIRMED without execution verification. Clixerfy deploys automated Playwright headless browsers to physically navigate the target, capture real-time DOM states, catch live console alerts, and log permanent photographic proof of execution.

Clixerfy simultaneously tests security rules against major firewall ecosystems—including Coraza WAF, ModSecurity v3, and behaviorally simulated cloud environments like Cloudflare. By contrasting how different engines interpret the exact same mutated payload, Clixerfy catches subtle variations in detection logic.

Attackers regularly bypass firewalls by formatting HTTP requests in unusual ways. Clixerfy evaluates 22 distinct protocol ambiguity vectors, utilizing chunked encoding, multipart boundary mutations, and header rewrites to see if your WAF can be tricked into ignoring malicious web traffic.

Backed by an internally maintained, real-time vulnerability intelligence database, the tester automatically maps application technologies against historical CVE data to generate highly targeted validation campaigns.

faq.question: Will running a WAF scan disrupt my active web application services?

children.text: No. The platform's AI Attack Planner includes rate-limiting systems, adaptive backoff modules, and load protection features to verify defenses safely without degrading production performance.

faq.question: Can Clixerfy test cloud-native firewalls like Cloudflare and AWS WAF?

children.text: Yes. Alongside internal testing for Coraza and ModSecurity rules, Clixerfy features dedicated in-process behavioral simulations and direct live integration capabilities to audit cloud-delivered protection sets.

faq.question: What export formats are supported for security team handoffs?

children.text: Clixerfy produces compliance-ready documentation across multiple engineering and executive formats, including SARIF, JUnit, HTML summaries, raw JSON logs, and executive-ready PDF analytics.
Clixerfy offers flexible plan models designed to scale alongside your cloud application profile and validation frequency requirements.

data.title: Vulnerability Scanner
data.metaTitle: Continuous Vulnerability Scanner | Automated Attack Surface Mapping | Clixerfy
data.metaDescription: Discover, map, and secure your digital perimeter. Clixerfy Continuous Vulnerability Scanner integrates subdomain mapping, web crawling, and Git secret auditing into one engine.

children.text: Don’t Just Fix Flaws. Unearth Them Continuously.

Most organizations only scan the digital assets they know exist. The reality? Over time, expanding infrastructure leads to shadow IT—untracked testing subdomains, abandoned staging servers, and exposed internal API routes. Standard, scheduled point-in-time vulnerability assessments fail to catch these perimeter expansions, leaving your network open to exploitation.

Clixerfy Continuous Vulnerability Scanner is your automated eye in the sky. Engineered as a multi-tenant, cloud-native architecture, it acts as an ongoing security engine that constantly maps your real-world attack surface. It chains multi-stage asset discovery, deep web crawling, full application vulnerability scanning, and code-level leak checks into a unified platform.

features.sectionTitle: Engineered for Technical Precision & Enterprise Operations

items.title: Automated Pipeline Chaining
items.desc: Configure it once, secure it forever. Clixerfy supports deep pipeline chaining flags, meaning an initial crawling run automatically enqueues a vulnerability assessment, which can seamlessly chain a full web app scan sequentially.

icon.iconData: <path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M3 4h8M4 4v5a6 6 0 0 0 6 6h3a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v4M10 4v4a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h3a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v5m-7 0h8M12 9v6"/>

items.title: Deduplicated Finding Repositories
items.desc: Security operations shouldn't be buried under thousands of duplicate alerts. Our backend utilizes intelligent finding clustering, checking unique template IDs, severities, and target host footprints to deliver clear, actionable items.

items.title: Modern Architecture
items.desc: Built on highly concurrent TypeScript worker engines, our backend delegates scanning tasks over resilient Redis-backed job queues, running heavy analytical scans smoothly without affecting dashboard operations.

cta.title: Map and Eliminate Your Perimeter Blind Spots Today
cta.subtitle: Automate your security scanning pipeline and catch hidden infrastructure risks before malicious entities do.

children.text: Security doesn’t stop at the server boundary; a single credential leaked in source code can bypass the strongest perimeter firewalls. Clixerfy includes a dedicated internal GitHub Secret Scanning tab deeply integrated into your project dashboards.

Using an asynchronous secret extraction processor (BetterLeaks), Clixerfy clones code repositories and audits your entire historical Git commit chain to uncover accidentally leaked API keys, database passwords, and access tokens.
Securely scan corporate, private code arrays. Clixerfy safely manages encrypted organization-level Personal Access Tokens (PAT) to preserve code privacy during processing.

Built on Server-Sent Events (SSE), our interactive dashboards stream immediate repository scanning data, lines parsed, and commit counts directly to security teams, populating a dedicated github_secret findings dashboard with exact file and line-number evidence bundles.
Before running a scan, the platform uses domain verification (via DNS TXT tokens or cryptographic HTTP file checks) to guarantee tenant isolation. Once cleared, our discovery phase initiates:
Subdomain Enumeration
: Using high-velocity network probing tools (Subfinder), Clixerfy instantly maps out your active and hidden subdomain architectures.
Live Host Probing
: The output flows straight into a live verification layer (HTTPX), extracting live host response codes, page titles, active server paths, and underlying technology configurations.
Once your live web properties are established, the platform deploys autonomous web crawlers (Katana) to parse code and identify functional assets.
Endpoint Discovery
: It indexes full directory trees, identifying critical endpoints that developers might assume are well-hidden.
Security-Interesting Filtering

: Clixerfy intelligently separates background static assets from paths that present real security risk—automatically flagging and prioritizing directories like /admin, /api, /config, and /backup folders for immediate vulnerability assessment.
The discovered pathways are dynamically routed into twin security execution engines:
Template-Based Threat Scans
: Utilizing industry-standard, continuously updated template arrays (Nuclei), the engine tests for millions of known CVE configurations, configuration mistakes, and web system flaws.
Active API Web Application Scanning

: Clixerfy hooks directly into robust web application testing layers (OWASP ZAP/Burpsuite). It controls automated active scanning and active spiders to systematically evaluate web input fields, forms, and headers.

faq.question: How often do continuous scans run?

children.text: You can define exact intervals (daily, weekly, or monthly) through our automated scan scheduler, which handles repeatable background jobs using custom cron expressions.

faq.question: How does Clixerfy prevent duplicate vulnerability alerts?

children.text: Our system includes a native database deduplication layer. Findings are clustered based on their template signatures, exploit URLs, and severity ratings, giving your developers a clean list of issues to remediate.

faq.question: Are my stored GitHub tokens safe within the platform?

children.text: Yes. Organization Personal Access Tokens (PATs) are encrypted at rest inside isolated tables, strictly mapped via multi-tenant permissions, and used only within temporary worker execution environments during a scan.
Clixerfy provides simple tier options built to scale efficiently along with your network scope, project footprint, and team structure.

data.title: The Clixerfy Fraudulent Click Blocker
data.metaTitle: Advanced Adfraud Blocker | Stop Fake Traffic & Save Ad Budget | Clixerfy
data.metaDescription: Protect your ad spend from bots, competitors, and click farms. Clixerfy Adfraud Blocker stops invalid traffic in real-time with direct ad platform API sync.

herosection.titleText: The Clixerfy Fraudulent Click Blocker: Complete Ad Immunity
herosection.subtitle: Don’t Just Track Fraud. Terminate It.

children.text: Most advertisers blindly rely on the basic "Invalid Traffic" filters provided natively by major ad networks. The problem? Those filters are built to protect the advertising platform's bottom line, not yours. While they catch basic, outdated bots, they leave your campaigns completely exposed to highly sophisticated, human-like click fraud.

Clixerfy is your proactive defense system. Our advanced Adfraud Blocker acts as a 24/7 digital sentry. By analyzing visitor behavior in less than 100 milliseconds, we identify malicious intent and block threats before fake traffic drains your daily marketing budget.

Platform-native invalid traffic filters are naturally conservative. Ad networks only filter out traffic they are 100% certain is fraudulent to prevent "False Positives" (accidentally blocking an active buyer).
Clixerfy puts the control back into your hands. We provide an adjustable protection toggle that allows your security or marketing teams to dial in exactly how aggressively to shield your pipeline:

items.title: Medium Protection (Recommended)
items.desc: Filters out persistent repeat clickers, scrapers, and high-risk commercial VPNs.

features.sectionTitle: Designed for Enterprise Security, Built for Marketing ROI

children.text: Clixerfy bridges the gap between deep technical telemetry and clear business operations. While the platform runs complex cryptographic analysis under the hood, your management teams get absolute transparency through a simplified workspace.

items.title: Unified Financial Dashboards
items.desc: See exactly which threat vectors were stopped, where they originated, and precisely how much ad spend was preserved.

items.title: Enterprise Compliance & Auditing
items.desc: Complete with strict Team-Based Access Controls (RBAC), internal audit logs, and data privacy tools (DSAR handling), making it fully compatible for fast-growing agencies and enterprise marketing networks.

cta.title: Take Absolute Control of Your Ad Account Today
cta.subtitle: Stop letting fake clicks dictate your marketing performance. See exactly who is interacting with your campaigns and preserve your budget for real customers.

Richtext.title: What We Block: The 4 Pillars of Click Fraud

children.text: Whether it is an automated script or a human actor trying to sabotage your campaign, Clixerfy mitigates the risk across four core areas:

child.title: 1. Professional Competitor Attacks
child.subtitle: In highly competitive industries (such as Legal, Real Estate, Locksmiths, and SaaS), rival companies frequently click your ads to intentionally deplete your daily budget and push your business out of the search auctions.

children.text: The Clixerfy Defense:

We track unique device architecture and repeat clickers originating from the same corporate networks and office IPs. Once an entity crosses your custom threshold (e.g., 3 clicks within 24 hours), they are instantly restricted from seeing your ads.

child.title: 2. Sophisticated Botnets
child.subtitle: Modern malicious bots don't just click links and leave; they are programmed to mimic human behavior by scrolling pages, pausing, and executing micro-movements with the mouse. They utilize residential proxies to blend in with genuine home users.

children.text: The Clixerfy Defense

: Our Behavioral Biometrics Engine detects the mathematical perfection of automated interactions. Even if a bot tricks standard security scripts by routing through a local residential IP, its synthetic behavior instantly gives it away.

child.title: 3. Global Click Farms
child.subtitle: Click farms employ low-wage workers to manually search for your keywords and interact with your paid ad placements. Because these are real humans sitting at real devices, traditional anti-bot software fails to flag them.

children.text: The Clixerfy Defense

: Clixerfy monitors deep Device Fingerprints. If our network flags multiple supposedly unique users sharing identical hardware signatures, or originating from a known click-farm data center range, the entire sector is cleanly neutralized.

child.title: 4. Malicious Scrapers & Spiders
child.subtitle: Competitors and scrapers use automated programs to crawl your landing pages via paid search or display ads to steal your pricing models, catalog information, and ad copies.

children.text: The Clixerfy Defense

: We intelligently separate "Good Bots" (like Google’s indexer) from malicious scrapers. The platform allows authorized search spiders to crawl seamlessly while instantly zapping harmful data harvesters.

icon.iconData: <g fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"><path d="M10 5v1m4 0V5m-4 5.4V8a2 2 0 1 1 4 0v2.4M7 15H4l-2 2.5m5.42-.5L5 20l1 2m2-10l-4-1l-2-3m7 3L5.5 6L7 2"/><path d="M8 18a5 5 0 1 1 8 0s-2 3-4 4c-2-1-4-4-4-4"/><path d="m15 11l3.5-5L17 2m-1 10l4-1l2-3m-5 7h3l2 2.5m-5.43-.5L19 20l-1 2"/></g>

children.text: The moment a user clicks your advertisement, the lightweight Clixerfy script executes. In under 100 milliseconds, our edge-layer inspects:
Connection Architecture: Is the visitor masking their trace via a high-risk VPN, proxy, or hosting data center?
Environment Integrity: Is the browser rendering via a headless environment (run by pure backend code rather than a consumer interface)?
Global Reputation Data: Has this specific entity been previously blacklisted by our global network of thousands of protected sites?

If a click is determined to be invalid, Clixerfy doesn't just flag it for an end-of-month report. Our backend system relies on a Direct API Sync to communicate instantly with your Google, Meta, or Microsoft Ads managers. The malicious IP address or placement is appended to your account's exclusion list dynamically, taking effect immediately.

Once the blocker is active, the money previously wasted on digital noise is preserved. This "saved" capital is automatically utilized where it matters most: targeting high-intent human buyers. As a result, companies experience a visible lift in overall conversion rates because every click bought is a real opportunity.

faq.question: How does Clixerfy integrate with my current website or landing pages?

children.text: Integration is seamless. It requires placing a simple, optimized asynchronous JavaScript snippet on your landing pages or tag manager. It loads instantly without impacting page load speed or Core Web Vitals.

faq.question: Will this block my legitimate users who happen to use VPNs?

children.text: Our behavioral biometric analysis relies on multiple data markers. A user simply browsing over a commercial VPN will not be blocked unless their underlying environment displays automated bot traits, high-frequency repeat clicking, or headless browser configurations.

faq.question: What ad networks do you support?

children.text: Clixerfy integrates directly via secure APIs with Google Ads, Meta (Facebook & Instagram) Ads, and Microsoft (Bing) Ads, allowing real-time automated IP and placement exclusions across your active workspaces.
Clixerfy fits seamlessly into any budget framework, returning its cost multiple times over by salvaging your native ad spend. Select the tier tailored to your active ad click volume.

data.title: WP Monitor
data.metaTitle: Centralized WordPress File Scanner & Malware Monitor | Clixerfy WP Monitor
data.metaDescription: Secure your WordPress infrastructure with centralized, zero-overhead security. Clixerfy WP Monitor uses off-server YARA scanning, file integrity checks, and user auditing.

children.text: Advanced malware scanning, file integrity monitoring, and expert malware removal — without slowing down your website.

Traditional WordPress security plugins perform resource-intensive scans directly on your server, consuming CPU, memory, and storage while remaining vulnerable to attackers who can disable or remove the plugin after compromising a website.

Clixerfy WP Monitor takes a different approach. Lightweight monitoring runs on your WordPress site while advanced malware analysis, integrity verification, heuristic detection, and threat correlation are processed through Clixerfy's cloud security platform. This minimizes server overhead while providing centralized visibility into your website's security posture.
Protect your WordPress website with automated malware scanning, real-time monitoring, expert remediation, and enterprise-grade threat detection.

cta.title: Secure Your WordPress Portfolio Without Compromising Performance
cta.subtitle: Offload heavy security analysis to our centralized monitoring engine. Get deep, silent, and zero-impact visibility across every single site you manage.

children.text: Beyond scanning files, Clixerfy WP Monitor coordinates every aspect of your site's operational and architectural security posture from a single centralized platform.

Traditional security plugins perform resource-intensive scans on your hosting server. Clixerfy uses a lightweight monitoring approach while advanced malware analysis runs through our cloud security platform, minimizing performance impact without compromising protection.

Protect your WordPress website with automated daily malware scanning, unlimited on-demand scans, deep filesystem analysis, file integrity verification, real-time monitoring, and behavioral threat detection—all from a single security platform.

Detect both known and emerging threats using YARA signature matching, heuristic analysis, behavioral anomaly detection, location-based risk analysis, and composite threat scoring to identify suspicious activity before it becomes a security incident.

Monitor WordPress core files, plugins, and critical system changes using SHA-256 hash verification, WordPress.org plugin validation, delta scanning, and real-time hook monitoring for file uploads, plugin updates, and editor changes.

Track privilege escalation, administrator account creation, IP access, brute-force attempts, permission changes, and other security events. Receive detailed email reports with threat severity, evidence snippets, historical scan comparisons, and compliance-ready reporting.

When malware is detected, our security specialists provide manual malware removal, quarantine logging, post-removal verification, root cause analysis, and hardening recommendations. Enterprise customers also receive priority response times.
Detect known malware using continuously updated signature rules.

faq.question: How does off-server analysis protect my site performance?

children.text: The local plugin only maps file paths, calculates quick cryptographic hashes, and tracks system events. This metadata is compressed using gzip optimization—reducing bandwidth usage by 70% to 90%. Because all heavy signature processing and behavioral heuristics run on Clixerfy's external cloud infrastructure, your sites keep running at peak speed.

faq.question: What happens if an attacker blocks communication with the API server?

children.text: Clixerfy tracks consistent heartbeat checkpoints from your sites every 5 to 15 minutes. If a site misses its check-in interval, our server instantly flags the instance as offline and dispatches an automated downtime alert, notifying you that communications have been broken or tampered with.

faq.question: How does Clixerfy keep false positives from overwhelming my team?

children.text: Our platform uses an intelligent white-list engine that combines global allowances with site-specific rules. Verified assets pulled directly from WordPress.org receive an automatic false-positive deduction. Known, safe plugin update chains are recognized automatically, preventing harmless updates from triggering security alerts.
Clixerfy WP Monitor scales perfectly whether you are an enterprise organization managing public portfolios or a web agency safeguarding dozens of client client workspaces.
